description: With over 200 years of expertise, YARDLEY selects only the finest ingredients to create its unforgettable fragrances. This body spray leaves your skin feeling fresh with a subtle hint of the warm and spicy scent of Sandalwood.Quantity: 150 mlCautionFlammable, pressurised containerKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
